Description: Participant-level metadata for the ASD Precision fMRI dataset

age.Description: Age of the participant at time of first session

handedness.Description: Handedness of the participant (average of three Edinburgh items)

years_education.Description: Number of years of formal education completed

Levels.9-12 years: Some high school to completed high school
Levels.13-16 years: Completed high school to some college
Levels.17-20 years: Completed college to some graduate school

ethnicity.Description: Self-reported ethnicity of the participant (geographic birth place of parents and grandparents)

autism_diagnosis.Description: Whether the participant has an autism spectrum disorder diagnosis

autism_year.Description: Year when autism diagnosis was received

adhd_diagnosis.Description: Whether the participant has an ADHD diagnosis

id_diagnosis.Description: Whether the participant has an intellectual disability diagnosis

other_diagnosis.Description: Whether the participant has other diagnoses

other_diagnosis_description.Description: Description of other diagnoses if present

aq_social.Description: AQ subscale score for social skills

aq_attention_switching.Description: AQ subscale score for attention switching

aq_attention_to_detail.Description: AQ subscale score for attention to detail

sdq_total.Description: Strengths and Difficulties Questionnaire (SDQ) total difficulties score

sdq_emotional_problems.Description: SDQ subscale score for emotional problems

sdq_conduct_problems.Description: SDQ subscale score for conduct problems

sdq_peer_problems.Description: SDQ subscale score for peer relationship problems

sdq_prosocial.Description: SDQ subscale score for prosocial behavior

session_1_time.Description: Time of day for the participant's first session (format: HH:MM:SS)

session_2_time.Description: Time of day for the participant's second session (format: HH:MM:SS)

session_3_time.Description: Time of day for the participant's third session (format: HH:MM:SS)

days_between_1_2.Description: Number of days between the first and second sessions

days_between_2_3.Description: Number of days between the second and third sessions

days_between_1_3.Description: Number of days between the first and third sessions

rsfMRI_complete.Description: Whether all rsfMRI runs are available for the participant

Levels.False: Not all fMRI runs are available
